title: The Snow Road Begins
description: On pages 8–11, the snow road begins as wapol comes back to reclaim his kingdom as Luffy, Sanji, and Nami prepare for the dangerous climb toward Dr. Kureha.
scene: The Snow Road Begins. Wapol comes back to reclaim his kingdom as Luffy, Sanji, and Nami prepare for the dangerous climb toward Dr. Kureha. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We'll get you to a doctor soon.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy. Be more careful when running or Nami's body won't hold up.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: They're white and big so they gotta be polar bears!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I just hope they don't come across any lapins...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You said they're carnivorous but they're still just rabbits, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes... Agile as normal rabbits but with the body of bears. And they happen to hunt in packs as well.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You were looking for the doctor, weren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, but the patient has already-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well good, because she just came down to the neighbouring village!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did you spot those pirates from yester- day!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We've reached our home- land, drum Island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: At the neighbouring village of cocoa weed.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Do something 'bout your damn kid already! His crying is getting on my nerves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: TAMACHI! What is it, are you hurt somewhere?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I can't help you if you only keep on crying. And you're bothering all the customers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If you don't stop your crying, I'll have you stand outside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh? Did you hear that, chopper?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee he

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Even though a child's unrelenting cry is the surest sign of a disease...

summary: This part centers on the snow road begins, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
